scripts.build:ts:p1: bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-injector' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-injector-native' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-engine' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-client' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-vite' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-i18n' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-router' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-query' build
scripts.build:ts:p2: bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-server' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-react' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-query-react' build
scripts.build:ts:p3: bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-adapter-hono' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-adapter-bun' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-adapter-node' build && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-tanstack-router' build
scripts.build:ts: bun run build:ts:p1 && bun run build:ts:p2 && bun run build:ts:p3
scripts.test:ts: bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-injector' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-server' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-injector-native' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-engine' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-adapter-hono' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-adapter-bun' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-adapter-node' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-client' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-react' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-tanstack-router' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-router' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/eslint-plugin-seam' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-i18n' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-vite' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-query' test && bun run --filter '@canmi/seam-query-react' test
